summary: Discount Calculation Bug Fix - ALL 11 TESTS PASSED. The discount field mapping and idempotency issues are fixed. Backend correctly maps 'discount' -> 'discount_percent' and keeps 'discount_amount' as a separate field. No snowball effect when saving same values 3 times.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PUT /api/orders now correctly maps 'discount' -> 'discount_percent' in DB (line 819)
✅ 'discount_amount' is separate allowed field (line 814), no longer overwritten by 'discount'
✅ When only discount_percent is provided, discount_amount is calculated on READ (lines 596-597)

success_rate.frontend: N/A - backend only testing per request

idempotency_test.description: Save same values 3 times, verify no drift

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test order OC-7388
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discount calculation bug fix verified. Order 7388 has items: GL004 (100x60=6000) + TX9147 (20x140=2800) = 8800 total_rental. Discount: 18.18% = 1600 UAH. Backend field mapping: frontend 'discount' -> DB 'discount_percent', frontend 'discount_amount' -> DB 'discount_amount'. New response field 'total_after_discount' = total_price - discount_amount.
